recap:
- Always delete the deployed endpoint at the end of a session to prevent conflicts for other users.
- Use `MlflowClient` to manage registered models and endpoints in MLflow.
- Implement error handling when deleting resources to capture any issues that may arise.
- Remove the payload table associated with the model using Spark SQL to free up resources.
- Delete the feedback registered model to ensure it does not persist unnecessarily.
- Confirm successful deletion of resources by printing confirmation messages or errors.
